global_strategy: Apply 3W Framework consistently across all files: WHAT (clear definitions with examples), WHY (motivation/benefits), HOW (implementation with code). Add standard learning structure: Learning Objectives → Content → Key Takeaways → Concept Check. Reduce code-heavy presentation by adding explanatory context before each code block. Ensure progressive complexity flow: Overview → Unit (basic) → Validation (intermediate) → Automation (advanced). Add cross-references between related concepts (e.g., link automation scripts back to validation methods). Consider merging redundant content or creating separate reference appendix for frequently repeated code patterns.
